title: Initialize Shared Dependencies with sync.OnceValues in Go
summary: Initialize one shared dependency in Go with sync.OnceValues so every caller sees the same first result.
highlights: Replays the first value or error
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Go 1.24.4 on macOS. Verified behavior covers cached success values, cached errors, concurrent callers, nil initializer functions, and repeated panics.
